title: RayTracing
description: A modpack that uses the Photonics mod to allow for high-performance raytracing without the need for an RTX GPU. The Photonics mod also adds 3d textures to 2d models.
body:
A simple mod pack that adds rayracing support to Minecraft using the Photonics mod. It also includes controller support as well as several general optimization mods. The pack doesn't require an RTX GPU to run\
-Minimum System Specs: GTX 1650/GTX970/RX580 1080p Med\
-recommended at least a GTX 1070 for 1080p ultra \
-GTX 1080ti/RTX 3060 12g/RTX 4060/RX 6600xt or better for 1440p ultra

Current Bugs Im aware of:
                         3d Textures may be glitched or have an odd apearence\
        The world may not load properly or have visual glitches, reload shaders to fix
